steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The data reveals a stark contrast: 0.20 probability in open-policy countries versus 0.03 in restrictive-policy countries. This decisive difference shows policy environment directly shaped which countries received swap lines.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: “Material to” means important or significant to an outcome. The other three choices either reverse the causal direction, imply indirect influence, or deny any connection entirely. That matches choice C — C is correct.
